Gas Mileage Calculator

Calculate your vehicle's fuel efficiency (MPG or L/100km). Enter distance traveled and fuel used to find your gas mileage and cost per mile.

FAQ

How to calculate MPG?

MPG = Miles Driven / Gallons Used. Example: 300 miles on 10 gallons = 30 MPG. Fill up, reset trip meter, fill up again and divide.

What is good gas mileage?

Average new car gets about 25-30 MPG. Hybrids get 40-60 MPG. EVs equivalent is 100+ MPGe. Trucks/SUVs average 20-25 MPG.
